expedited_checkout.description: Welcome to DCB walk-up requesting. Please provide the barcode and the library of the patron you would like to make a request for. <paragraph>Provided that the patron's details are valid and the item exists and is available at your library, DCB will instantly check out this item to the specified patron.</paragraph>

feedback.in_progress: Your walk-up request has been successfully placed and DCB is now attempting to check it out.
feedback.in_progress_explanation: Your walk-up request has been successfully placed and DCB is now attempting to check it out.
feedback.success: Your walk-up request has been checked out successfully and can be tracked in DCB Admin <linkComponent> here </linkComponent>.
feedback.success_requesting_only: Your walk-up request has been checked out successfully.

expedited_checkout.option_description: Place a walk-up request for an item at your library for a visiting OpenRS patron. This will instantly check out the item.

steps.checkout_failure: Item checkout is taking too long. Please view the request and use the 'check for updates' option to refresh its status.
steps.checkout_failure_request_only: Item checkout is taking too long. Please ask a library admin to view this request.
steps.checkout_success: The item has been successfully checked out, and all steps are complete. The due date for this item is {{dueDate}}.
steps.checkout_waiting: The request has been created. Please wait while we attempt to check out the item.
steps.patron_validation_instruction: Please provide the barcode and the affiliated institution of the patron.
steps.request_creation_instruction: The patron barcode is valid. Please now provide the remaining details.

shared_index.error_connecting: There was an error connecting to the search service. Please try again later.
shared_index.items_not_shown_helper_item: Items without an item type are usually the result of a missing or misconfigured item type mapping. Please review the item type mappings for this library.
shared_index.items_not_shown_helper_location: Items without an 'Agency' value are usually the result of a missing or misconfigured Location mapping, or a missing agency. Please review the Location mappings for this library and the agency configuration.
shared_index.items_not_shown_long: {{number}} item(s) unable to be shown. You may have missing mappings or other configuration issues.
shared_index.items_not_shown_resolution: If the item(s) below belong to your library and should be available to users, please review the mappings in the 'Mappings' section. There may be incorrect or missing mappings preventing DCB from showing the items below

welcome.background: Thank you for participating in the DCB Admin for Libraries pre-release! DCB Admin for Libraries is an all-new part of the DCB experience, tailored to the tasks library staff do every day. Expect this pre-release to change constantly as we add new functionality and continue to improve the product. You can provide feedback <linkComponent>here</linkComponent>.
welcome.title: Welcome to DCB Admin for {{library}}, {{name}}.
